zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Cherfholt de Bettreds於1204年出生在英國肯特時，他的父親Richard Cherfholt de Bettreds30歲，母親Mrs. Richard Bettreds29歲。他和Mrs. Richard Bettreds至少有1個兒子。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Cherfholt de Bettreds于1204年出生在英国肯特时，他的父亲Richard Cherfholt de Bettreds30岁，母亲Mrs. Richard Bettreds29岁。他和Mrs. Richard Bettreds至少有1个儿子。

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Deborah
meanings: Biblical name (meaning ‘bee’ in Hebrew), borne by the nurse of Rebecca (Genesis 35:8) and by a woman judge and prophet (Judges 4–5) who led the Israelites to victory over the Canaanites. It has always been popular as a Jewish name. It was in use among Christians by the mid 16th century and was taken up by the Puritans in the 17th century, in part because the bee was a symbol of industriousness. Since then it has enjoyed enormous popularity, peaking in the 1960s. Among other famous bearers is the actress  Deborah Kerr  (  1921–2007 ).

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Cherfholt de Bettreds was born in 1204, in Kent, England, his father, Richard Cherfholt de Bettreds, was 30 and his mother, Mrs. Richard Bettreds, was 29. He had at least 1 son with Mrs. Richard Bettreds.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Cherfholt de Bettreds est né en 1204, à Kent, Angleterre, son père, Richard Cherfholt de Bettreds, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Richard Bettreds, avait 29 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Mrs. Richard Bettreds.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Cherfholt de Bettreds 1204 in Kent, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Cherfholt de Bettreds 30 und seine Mutter Mrs. Richard Bettreds 29. Er hatte mit Mrs. Richard Bettreds mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Cherfholt de Bettreds è nato il nel 1204 nel Kent, England, il suo padre, Richard Cherfholt de Bettreds, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Richard Bettreds, aveva 29 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Mrs. Richard Bettreds.

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Cherfholt de Bettreds(이)가 1204년 영국 켄트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Cherfholt de Bettreds(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Richard Bettreds(은)는 29세였다. 그는 Mrs. Richard Bettreds(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Cherfholt de Bettreds nasceu em 1204, em Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Cherfholt de Bettreds, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Richard Bettreds, tinha 29 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Mrs. Richard Bettreds.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Cherfholt de Bettreds родился в 1204 г. в местности кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Cherfholt de Bettreds было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Richard Bettreds, 29. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Mrs. Richard Bettreds.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Cherfholt de Bettreds nació en 1204, en Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Cherfholt de Bettreds, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Mrs. Richard Bettreds, tenía 29 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Mrs. Richard Bettreds.
